company_name: 中国太平洋保险（集团）股份有限公司
notes: The official China Pacific Insurance group site exposes a public 员工招聘 page and therefore verifies the recruitment entry. The fetched page contains no enumerable job rows, unique role-detail URLs, duties, requirements, locations, dates or salary fields. An official Pacific Health Insurance talent page also links to https://app.mokahr.com/apply/taibaoanlian/6794, but the available public fetch encountered a redirect loop and exposed no role inventory. No login, CAPTCHA, cookies, hidden interface or access control was bypassed; absence of parsed rows is not treated as proof of no openings. Subsidiary portals require compliant dynamic enumeration.

company_name: 新华人寿保险股份有限公司
notes: The official New China Life news index lists two 2026 recruitment signals: 新华保险2026年春季校园招聘正式启动 dated 2026-03-25 and 三十而立 新启华章丨新华保险2026年全系统社会招聘 dated 2026-04-19. Both detail links resolve to the company's official WeChat publications, which were not fetchable in the available public environment, so role names, departments, duties, requirements, locations, education, experience, deadlines, salary disclosure and current application status could not be enumerated. No third-party vacancy source was substituted and no access control was bypassed.
